title: Duncit — Logs & Errors
description: Error-focused view of all Duncit logs (server + per-app via @duncit/logs). Import in SignOz → Dashboards → New → Import JSON.

widgets.title: Total errors
widgets.description: Count of ERROR logs in the selected range.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE severity_text = 'ERROR' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}}

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp), INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS ts, toFloat64(count()) AS value FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE severity_text = 'ERROR' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT multiIf(attributes_string['app'] != '', attributes_string['app'], resources_string['service.name']) AS app, countIf(severity_text = 'ERROR') AS errors, count() AS total FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}} GROUP BY app ORDER BY errors DESC, total DESC

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT attributes_string['portal'] AS portal, count() AS errors FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE severity_text = 'ERROR' AND attributes_string['portal'] != '' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}} GROUP BY portal ORDER BY errors DESC

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT substring(body, 1, 160) AS message, count() AS count FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE severity_text = 'ERROR' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}} GROUP BY message ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 25

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT multiIf(attributes_string['app'] != '', attributes_string['app'], 'server') AS app, attributes_string['page'] AS page, attributes_string['component'] AS component, count() AS errors FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE severity_text = 'ERROR' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_timestamp_nano}} AND {{.end_timestamp_nano}} GROUP BY app, page, component ORDER BY errors DESC LIMIT 25
